name: Ultimate Ears Wonderboom 3
introText: The UE Wonderboom 3 is IP67 waterproof, floats in water, and delivers 14-hour battery life in a 425g ball that fits in a water bottle pocket — the best compact outdoor speaker for $129 CAD.
whatWorks: Floats in water — the Wonderboom 3 is buoyant, making it the only speaker in this review you can actually use in a pool or lake without risking loss.
Omnidirectional sound projection — the circular shape projects sound 360°, eliminating the need to aim the speaker toward the listening area.
worthKnowing: Sound quality is limited by the small size — 425g and omnidirectional design means less bass depth and volume ceiling than similarly priced cylindrical speakers.
No USB-C passthrough for charging devices — the Wonderboom 3 is input only; can't charge your phone from the speaker.

commonComplaints.title: Limited bass at this size
commonComplaints.body: The small form factor constrains bass output. The Wonderboom 3 is tinny at low frequencies compared to larger competitors at similar prices.

commonComplaints.title: Volume ceiling lower than cylindrical speakers
commonComplaints.body: The Wonderboom 3 maxes out at a volume level that's good for a table but won't fill a backyard gathering. The JBL Flip 7 is significantly louder.

commonComplaints.title: Pairing two Wonderbooms for stereo is same-model only
commonComplaints.body: Wonderboom to Wonderboom pairing works but requires two of the same model. The stereo upgrade isn't compatible across UE speaker lines.

verdict: The UE Wonderboom 3 is the best speaker for water-activity use — the floating IP67 design is uniquely suited for pools, hot tubs, and kayaking. For general outdoor use where volume matters more than floating capability, the JBL Flip 7 at $50 more is the better choice.

realBuyers.quote: Pool speaker that actually floats. Have dropped it in the pool 10+ times. Never had a problem.
Perfect for hot tub. IP67 handles steam and splashes perfectly. 14-hour battery lasts the whole party.
Compact enough to clip to a kayak. Goes on every water trip. Indispensable.

metaDescription: UE Wonderboom 3 review Canada: IP67, floats, 14-hr battery, 425g. $129 CAD. Best compact outdoor speaker for Canadians who love water activities.
